untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit broadening pattern detection and target price calculation, which are not available as atomic indicators. Broadening patterns require identification of expanding highs/lows over time, and target prices require pattern-specific geometry calculations. Substituted Bollinger Bands (band breakouts) as a proxy for pattern extremes and Pivot Points (R1/S1) as proxy for target zones, but this is approximate.
translation_notes: BULKOWSKI_DRY_0 describes a broadening pattern with directional breakout and target-based exits. Since the engine lacks pattern recognition indicators, used: (1) Bollinger Bands upper/lower as proxies for pattern breakout extremes, (2) Pivot Points R1/S1 as proxy for target levels, (3) Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to reflect that breakouts can be bullish or bearish, (4) Exit logic uses OR because trader should exit on EITHER reaching target zone OR reversal signal (prev_close crossunder). Stop-loss set conservatively at 2% based on typical pattern trade risk management.
